item.title: This Burger Was Bigger Than My Head
item.description: A fun burger challenge featuring an oversized burger and plenty of flavor. A lighthearted food moment for fans of big portions and challenge videos.

media:content.media:title: This Burger Was Bigger Than My Head
media:content.media:description: A fun burger challenge featuring an oversized burger and plenty of flavor. A lighthearted food moment for fans of big portions and challenge videos.

item.title: Pizza Challenge at an Italian Cafe
item.description: A pizza challenge takes place at an Italian cafe, featuring large portions, fast eating, and competitive food tasting.

media:content.media:title: Pizza Challenge at an Italian Cafe
media:content.media:description: A pizza challenge takes place at an Italian cafe, featuring large portions, fast eating, and competitive food tasting.

item.title: Johnny Cash Platter Challenge
item.description: A large food platter challenge features multiple items served together, testing appetite and speed in a competitive eating setting.

media:content.media:title: Johnny Cash Platter Challenge
media:content.media:description: A large food platter challenge features multiple items served together, testing appetite and speed in a competitive eating setting.

item.title: Comparing Fast-Food Eating Speed
item.description: A fast-food challenge compares eating speed across different meals, focusing on portion size, pace, and competitive eating performance.

media:content.media:title: Comparing Fast-Food Eating Speed
media:content.media:description: A fast-food challenge compares eating speed across different meals, focusing on portion size, pace, and competitive eating performance.

item.title: Meat Lover’s Food Challenge
item.description: A large meat-focused food challenge tests appetite and speed with multiple protein-heavy dishes in a competitive eating format.

media:content.media:description: A large meat-focused food challenge tests appetite and speed with multiple protein-heavy dishes in a competitive eating format.

item.title: Giant Sandwich Eating Challenge
item.description: A massive sandwich is featured in a competitive eating challenge, testing speed and appetite with oversized portions and layered ingredients.

media:content.media:title: Giant Sandwich Eating Challenge
media:content.media:description: A massive sandwich is featured in a competitive eating challenge, testing speed and appetite with oversized portions and layered ingredients.

item.title: Can I Finish a Huge Burger for $100?
item.description: A massive burger challenge with a cash prize on the line, testing appetite, endurance, and speed in a competitive eating setup.

media:content.media:title: Can I Finish a Huge Burger for $100?
media:content.media:description: A massive burger challenge with a cash prize on the line, testing appetite, endurance, and speed in a competitive eating setup.
